definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Who is that person?]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado como pronombre interrogativo para preguntar sobre una persona.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as an interrogative pronoun to ask about a person.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Que / Quien / El cual (para personas)]
definitions.usage_example: The man who called me is here.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The man who called me is here.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado como pronombre relativo para introducir una cláusula sobre una persona.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as a relative pronoun to introduce a clause about a person.

definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: What is your name?]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado como palabra interrogativa para pedir información (elección abierta).]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as an interrogative word to ask for information (open choice).

definitions.usage_example: I don't know what to do.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I don't know what to do.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado como pronombre relativo para referirse a 'la(s) cosa(s) que'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as a relative pronoun to refer to 'the thing(s) that'.

definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Which color do you prefer?]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado como palabra interrogativa para preguntar sobre una elección limitada.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as an interrogative word to ask about a limited choice.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Que / El cual / La cual]
definitions.usage_example: The car which is red is mine.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The car which is red is mine.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado como pronombre relativo para introducir una cláusula sobre una cosa.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as a relative pronoun to introduce a clause about a thing.
